_meta.description: Visitor testimonials and reviews - all verified from real sources
_meta.policy: Only use verified real testimonials - never fabricate
_meta.staffInstructions: This file stores visitor quotes displayed on the website. FEATURED testimonials appear on the homepage and event pages. BY CATEGORY testimonials are organized for future use in specific sections. You can safely add new testimonials, edit quotes, or change which pages they appear on. Always use REAL quotes from verified sources - never make them up!

fieldGuide.id: Unique identifier - use format: source-keyword (e.g., 'ta-hidden-gem', 'google-family'). Keep it short and descriptive.
fieldGuide.quote: The exact visitor quote. Keep it under 200 characters for best display. Use ... to trim long quotes.
fieldGuide.attribution: How to credit the reviewer. Use 'Rocky Mount visitor', 'TripAdvisor reviewer', 'Family visitor', etc. Do NOT use real names without permission.
fieldGuide.source: Where the review came from. Must be one of: TripAdvisor, Google Reviews, Facebook, Educator survey
fieldGuide.sourceUrl: Link to the original review (optional but recommended for verification)
fieldGuide.rating: Star rating from 1-5. We typically only feature 4-5 star reviews.
fieldGuide.date: Date of the review in YYYY-MM-DD format, or null if unknown
fieldGuide.tags: Keywords for organizing. Use lowercase with hyphens: 'family', 'hidden-gem', 'hands-on', 'staff', 'events'
fieldGuide.usedOn: Which pages display this quote: 'homepage', 'first-families-reunion', 'colonial-independence-day', etc.

newFeaturedTestimonial.quote: Your visitor quote here - keep under 200 characters
newFeaturedTestimonial.attribution: Visitor type (e.g., Family visitor, History enthusiast)

rules: NEVER fabricate or paraphrase quotes - use exact wording from real reviews
NEVER use a visitor's full name without written permission
Always verify the source before adding (check TripAdvisor, Google, or Facebook)
Keep featured testimonials to 3-5 maximum for homepage rotation
Each testimonial must have a unique 'id' field
Only use reviews with 4+ star ratings
tips: SHORT QUOTES WORK BEST: Aim for 1-2 sentences. Long paragraphs don't display well.
FOCUS ON SPECIFICS: 'The blacksmith demonstration was amazing' beats 'It was nice'
HIGHLIGHT DIFFERENT ASPECTS: Mix quotes about staff, authenticity, family-friendliness, events
SEASONAL ROTATION: Update 'usedOn' to match current events and promotions
CHECK DATES: Remove testimonials referencing staff who've left or discontinued programs

whatGoesWhere.featured: These appear on the homepage carousel and can be assigned to specific event pages via 'usedOn'. These are your BEST quotes that represent Rocky Mount well.
whatGoesWhere.byCategory: These are organized by theme (authenticity, family, events, education) for future use in specific page sections. Good for building a library of quotes to draw from.

_aiRules.description: Rules for AI assistants editing testimonials
_aiRules.criticalRule: NEVER fabricate testimonials - all quotes must be real
beforeEditing: ALWAYS verify the quote source exists
ALWAYS use real visitor quotes only
NEVER use full names without permission
validation: Is this a real quote from a real visitor?
Is the source verified (TripAdvisor, Google, Facebook)?
Is the attribution appropriate (no full names without permission)?
prohibited: Do NOT fabricate quotes - this is unethical and potentially illegal
Do NOT use full names (use 'Jane D.' not 'Jane Doe')
Do NOT modify existing quotes without verification
Do NOT add testimonials without a verifiable source

sources.requiresUrl: TripAdvisor and Google reviews should have sourceUrl when possible

_aiRules.whenUnsure: If you cannot verify a testimonial is real, do not add it

featured.quote: It was like you got teleported back in time. The way the buildings are stocked and furnished is incredibly convincing—Rocky Mount looks like a place where people actually live. There is so much history here.
This is a hidden gem of Tennessee history. The staff are knowledgeable and passionate. Don't miss the blacksmith demonstration!
Perfect for families. Our kids loved the hands-on activities and the interpreters made history come alive. We'll definitely be back.

authenticity.quote: The attention to historical detail is remarkable. You can tell the staff truly care about preserving this piece of Tennessee history.

family.quote: Great educational experience for all ages. The costumed interpreters answered every question our curious kids had.

events.quote: The July 4th celebration was incredible. Musket demonstrations, period music, and the best view of fireworks in the region.

education.quote: I've been bringing my students here for 15 years. It's the best hands-on history experience in East Tennessee.

stats._staffNote: STAFF EDITABLE: Update these numbers periodically from TripAdvisor and Google. Check monthly and update when counts change significantly.

_templates.description: Templates for requesting testimonials - copy when asking visitors
_templates.postVisitRequest: We'd love to hear about your experience! Leave a review on TripAdvisor or Google to help other visitors discover Rocky Mount.
_templates.eventFollowUp: Thank you for attending [EVENT_NAME]! If you enjoyed your experience, please consider sharing a review. Your feedback helps us continue preserving Tennessee history.
